FLEX_POWER.title: Strength Down
FLEX_POWER.description: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
FLEX_POWER.smartDescription: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
COMBUST_POWER_C.title: Combust
COMBUST_POWER_C.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
COMBUST_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
EVOLVE_POWER_C.title: Evolve
EVOLVE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
EVOLVE_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
FIRE_BREATHING_POWER_C.title: Fire Breathing
FIRE_BREATHING_POWER_C.description: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
FIRE_BREATHING_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
METALLICIZE_POWER_C.title: Metallicize
METALLICIZE_POWER_C.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
METALLICIZE_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
BERSERK_POWER_C.title: Berserk
BERSERK_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
BERSERK_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
BRUTALITY_POWER_C.title: Brutality
BRUTALITY_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
BRUTALITY_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
RUPTURE_POWER_C.title: Rupture
RUPTURE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
RUPTURE_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
A_THOUSAND_CUTS_POWER.title: Thousand Cuts
A_THOUSAND_CUTS_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
A_THOUSAND_CUTS_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
CHOKE_HOLD_POWER.title: Choked
CHOKE_HOLD_POWER.description: Whenever the player plays a card this turn, this enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
CHOKE_HOLD_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever the player plays a card this turn, this enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.title: Corpse Explosion
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.description: On death, deal damage equal to Max HP to ALL enemies.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.smartDescription: On death, deal damage equal to Max HP to ALL enemies.
PHANTASMAL_KILLER_POWER.title: Phantasmal
ELECTRODYNAMICS_POWER_C.title: Electro
STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER_C.title: Static Discharge
STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you receive attack damage, Channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Lightning.
STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER_C.smartDescriptio: Whenever you receive attack damage, Channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Lightning.
CREATIVE_AI_POWER_C.title: Creative AI
CREATIVE_AI_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Power cards into your hand.
CREATIVE_AI_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Power cards into your hand.
HELLO_WORLD_POWER_C.title: Hello
HELLO_WORLD_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Common cards into your hand.
HELLO_WORLD_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Common cards into your hand.
STORM_POWER_C.title: Storm
STORM_POWER_C.description: Whenever you play a Power card, Channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Lightning.
STORM_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you play a Power card, Channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Lightning.
MACHINE_LEARNING_POWER_C.title: Machine Learning
MACHINE_LEARNING_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional cards.
MACHINE_LEARNING_POWER_C.smartDescriptio: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional cards.
SELF_REPAIR_POWER_C.title: Repair
SELF_REPAIR_POWER_C.description: At the end of combat, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
SELF_REPAIR_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the end of combat, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
LOOP_POWER_C.title: Loop
LOOP_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next [gold]Orb[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
LOOP_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next [gold]Orb[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
HEATSINKS_POWER_C.title: Heatsink
HEATSINKS_POWER_C.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power card[/gold], draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
HEATSINKS_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you play a [gold]Power card[/gold], draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
LOCK_ON_POWER_C.title: Lock-On
LOCK_ON_POWER_C.description: Receives 50% more damage from Orbs for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s).
LOCK_ON_POWER_C.smartDescription: Receives 50% more damage from Orbs for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s).
REBOUND_POWER_C.title: Rebound
REBOUND_POWER_C.description: The next card you play this turn is placed on top of your draw pile.
REBOUND_POWER_C.smartDescription: The next card you play this turn is placed on top of your draw pile.
AMPLIFY_POWER_C.title: Amplify
AMPLIFY_POWER_C.description: Your next [gold]Power card[/gold] is played twice this turn.
AMPLIFY_POWER_C.smartDescription: Your next [gold]Power card[/gold] is played twice this turn.
ECHO_FORM_POWER_C.title: Echo Form
ECHO_FORM_POWER_C.description: The first card you play each turn is played twice.
ECHO_FORM_POWER_C.smartDescription: The first card you play each turn is played twice.
SADISTIC_NATURE_POWER_C.title: Sadistic Nature
SADISTIC_NATURE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
SADISTIC_NATURE_POWER_C.smartDescription: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
MAGNETISM_POWER_C.title: Magnetism
MAGNETISM_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, add a random colorless card into your hand.
MAGNETISM_POWER_C.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add a random colorless card into your hand.
